description: The Bandidos Motorcycle Club is an outlaw motorcycle gang designated by the U.S. Department of Justice, involved in drug trafficking, weapons trafficking, murder, and other serious crimes. Active primarily in the Northwestern, Southeastern, Southwestern, and West Central regions of the United States, with an estimated 800-1,000 members across 16 states. The club is supplied with drugs by Los Zetas and has rivalries with the Hells Angels, Mongols, and others.
